reviews.comment:
El lugar, divino. Lo único, les recomiendo bajar del vehículo y ver lo que cargan, sobre todo aquellos que tengan diesel, a mi, un salame que jugaba con el celular me lleno de super, y como cambiaron las mangueras de lugar no me di cuenta, un desastre lo que vino después, lo tuve que dejar para que me vacien el tanque, 3 días, encima no me cambiaron el filtro, después me quedo perdiendo gasolina. Para matarlos, encima el encargado alto pel0tud0, ni disculpas me pidió, la verdad no tenia tiempo ni ganas de demandar, no revente el motor porque a 100 metros me di cuenta

(Translated by Google)
The place is divine. The only thing is, I recommend getting out of your vehicle and checking what they're filling up, especially those with diesel. Some idiot playing on his phone filled mine with premium, and since they'd switched the hoses, I didn't notice. What followed was a disaster. I had to leave my tank for three days to be emptied, and on top of that, they didn't change the filter, so now I'm leaking gas. I could have killed them. And the manager, a total jerk, didn't even apologize. Honestly, I didn't have the time or the inclination to sue. I only managed to save my engine because I realized what had happened a hundred meters away.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURDMHI2dURBEAE

reviews.comment:
YPF BOXES.

Fuimos con turno previamente asignado mediante el site de YPF.

Se realiza un diagnóstico completo del automóvil mediante la utilización de scanner.

Se detalla el Estado de 24 puntos verificados en el vehículo, junto con el Certificado del Producto (Lubricantes y Filtros, Fluidos y Filtros, Partes Mecánicas y Elementos de Seguridad).

Los puntos que no verifica el scanner son verificados y relevados por el técnico.

Descuento especial canjeando puntos serviclub.

Atención rápida y eficiente 9 puntos.

(Translated by Google)
YPF Service Center.

We had a pre-arranged appointment through the YPF website.

A complete vehicle diagnostic was performed using a scanner.

The report details the condition of 24 points checked on the vehicle, along with the Product Certificate (Lubricants and Filters, Fluids and Filters, Mechanical Parts, and Safety Components).

Any points not detected by the scanner were checked and reviewed by the technician.

Special discount available when redeeming Serviclub points.

Fast and efficient service (9 out of 10).
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURDd3JfNzVBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy amable el chico que me atendió, me limpió los vidrios y a pesar de que tenía barbijo se le veía en sus ojos la amabilidad. Este chico si aprendió algo de esta situación por la que estamos pasando.

(Translated by Google)
The young man who helped me was very kind. He cleaned my windows, and even though he was wearing a mask, his kindness shone through in his eyes. This young man definitely learned something from this situation we're all going through.
